```{=html}
<div style="width:94%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:0.95fr 0.28fr 1.55fr 0.28fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto auto;gap:0.95em 0.4em;align-items:center;">

  <!-- shared start: Idea (spans both rows) -->
  <div style="grid-column:1;grid-row:1 / 3;align-self:stretch;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.8em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#5654A2;">
    <i data-lucide="lightbulb" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">Idea</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.45em;">what to build,<br>what goes in it</div>
  </div>

  <!-- top path: traditional / frameworks -->
  <div style="grid-column:2;grid-row:1;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:center;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="grid-column:3;grid-row:1;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#FEF5E7;border:1px solid #F0DDB4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;flex-shrink:0;">
     <i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.2;">Frameworks</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-bottom:0.6em;">scaffold the pages, links &amp; stylesheet</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0.4em;width:fit-content;margin:0 auto;">
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://getbootstrap.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#7952B3" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Bootstrap"><path d="M11.77 11.24H9.956V8.202h2.152c1.17 0 1.834.522 1.834 1.466 0 1.008-.773 1.572-2.174 1.572zm.324 1.206H9.957v3.348h2.231c1.459 0 2.232-.585 2.232-1.685s-.795-1.663-2.326-1.663zM24 11.39v1.218c-1.128.108-1.817.944-2.226 2.268-.407 1.319-.463 2.937-.42 4.186.045 1.3-.968 2.5-2.337 2.5H4.985c-1.37 0-2.383-1.2-2.337-2.5.043-1.249-.013-2.867-.42-4.186-.41-1.324-1.1-2.16-2.228-2.268V11.39c1.128-.108 1.819-.944 2.227-2.268.408-1.319.464-2.937.42-4.186-.045-1.3.968-2.5 2.338-2.5h14.032c1.37 0 2.382 1.2 2.337 2.5-.043 1.249.013 2.867.42 4.186.409 1.324 1.098 2.16 2.226 2.268zm-7.927 2.817c0-1.354-.953-2.333-2.368-2.488v-.057c1.04-.169 1.856-1.135 1.856-2.213 0-1.537-1.213-2.538-3.062-2.538h-4.16v10.172h4.181c2.218 0 3.553-1.086 3.553-2.876z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Bootstrap</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://vuejs.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#4FC08D" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Vue"><path d="M24,1.61H14.06L12,5.16,9.94,1.61H0L12,22.39ZM12,14.08,5.16,2.23H9.59L12,6.41l2.41-4.18h4.43Z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">Vue</span></a>
    <a class="term-pill term-pill--gold" href="https://react.dev" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:6px;color:#C4881A;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="0.95em" height="0.95em" fill="#149ECA" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="React"><path d="M14.23 12.004a2.236 2.236 0 0 1-2.235 2.236 2.236 2.236 0 0 1-2.236-2.236 2.236 2.236 0 0 1 2.235-2.236 2.236 2.236 0 0 1 2.236 2.236zm2.648-10.69c-1.346 0-3.107.96-4.888 2.622-1.78-1.653-3.542-2.602-4.887-2.602-.41 0-.783.093-1.106.278-1.375.793-1.683 3.264-.973 6.365C1.98 8.917 0 10.42 0 12.004c0 1.59 1.99 3.097 5.043 4.03-.704 3.113-.39 5.588.988 6.38.32.187.69.275 1.102.275 1.345 0 3.107-.96 4.888-2.624 1.78 1.654 3.542 2.603 4.887 2.603.41 0 .783-.09 1.106-.275 1.374-.792 1.683-3.263.973-6.365C22.02 15.096 24 13.59 24 12.004c0-1.59-1.99-3.097-5.043-4.032.704-3.11.39-5.587-.988-6.38-.318-.184-.688-.277-1.092-.278zm-.005 1.09v.006c.225 0 .406.044.558.127.666.382.955 1.835.73 3.704-.054.46-.142.945-.25 1.44-.96-.236-2.006-.417-3.107-.534-.66-.905-1.345-1.727-2.035-2.447 1.592-1.48 3.087-2.292 4.105-2.295zm-9.77.02c1.012 0 2.514.808 4.11 2.28-.686.72-1.37 1.537-2.02 2.442-1.107.117-2.154.298-3.113.538-.112-.49-.195-.964-.254-1.42-.23-1.868.054-3.32.714-3.707.19-.09.4-.127.563-.132zm4.882 3.05c.455.468.91.992 1.36 1.564-.44-.02-.89-.034-1.345-.034-.46 0-.915.01-1.36.034.44-.572.895-1.096 1.345-1.565zM12 8.1c.74 0 1.477.034 2.202.093.406.582.802 1.203 1.183 1.86.372.64.71 1.29 1.018 1.946-.308.655-.646 1.31-1.013 1.95-.38.66-.773 1.288-1.18 1.87-.728.063-1.466.098-2.21.098-.74 0-1.477-.035-2.202-.093-.406-.582-.802-1.204-1.183-1.86-.372-.64-.71-1.29-1.018-1.946.303-.657.646-1.313 1.013-1.954.38-.66.773-1.286 1.18-1.868.728-.064 1.466-.098 2.21-.098zm-3.635.254c-.24.377-.48.763-.704 1.16-.225.39-.435.782-.635 1.174-.265-.656-.49-1.31-.676-1.947.64-.15 1.315-.283 2.015-.386zm7.26 0c.695.103 1.365.23 2.006.387-.18.632-.405 1.282-.66 1.933-.2-.39-.41-.783-.64-1.174-.225-.392-.465-.774-.705-1.146zm3.063.675c.484.15.944.317 1.375.498 1.732.74 2.852 1.708 2.852 2.476-.005.768-1.125 1.74-2.857 2.475-.42.18-.88.342-1.355.493-.28-.958-.646-1.956-1.1-2.98.45-1.017.81-2.01 1.085-2.964zm-13.395.004c.278.96.645 1.957 1.1 2.98-.45 1.017-.812 2.01-1.086 2.964-.484-.15-.944-.318-1.37-.5-1.732-.737-2.852-1.706-2.852-2.474 0-.768 1.12-1.742 2.852-2.476.42-.18.88-.342 1.356-.494zm11.678 4.28c.265.657.49 1.312.676 1.948-.64.157-1.316.29-2.016.39.24-.375.48-.762.705-1.158.225-.39.435-.788.636-1.18zm-9.945.02c.2.392.41.783.64 1.175.23.39.465.772.705 1.143-.695-.102-1.365-.23-2.006-.386.18-.63.406-1.282.66-1.933zM17.92 16.32c.112.493.2.968.254 1.423.23 1.868-.054 3.32-.714 3.708-.147.09-.338.128-.563.128-1.012 0-2.514-.807-4.11-2.28.686-.72 1.37-1.536 2.02-2.44 1.107-.118 2.154-.3 3.113-.54zm-11.83.01c.96.234 2.006.415 3.107.532.66.905 1.345 1.727 2.035 2.446-1.595 1.483-3.092 2.295-4.11 2.295-.22-.005-.406-.05-.553-.132-.666-.38-.955-1.834-.73-3.703.054-.46.142-.944.25-1.438zm4.56.64c.44.02.89.034 1.345.034.46 0 .915-.01 1.36-.034-.44.572-.895 1.095-1.345 1.565-.455-.47-.91-.993-1.36-1.565z"/></svg><span style="flex:1;text-align:center;">React</span></a>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="grid-column:4;grid-row:1;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:center;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <!-- bottom path: AI agent -->
  <div style="grid-column:2;grid-row:2;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:center;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div class="agent-card" style="grid-column:3;grid-row:2;background:#F4FBF8;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em 0.95em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(44,132,117,0.2);border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div class="agent-badge agent-badge--teal"><i data-lucide="crown" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>Today's focus</div>
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;">
     <i data-lucide="bot" style="width:0.95em;height:0.95em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;line-height:1.2;">AI Agent</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.48em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;">writes directly</div>
  </div>

  <div style="grid-column:4;grid-row:2;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:center;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <!-- shared finish: HTML & styling (spans both rows) -->
  <div style="grid-column:5;grid-row:1 / 3;align-self:stretch;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 0.8em 1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.12);border-top:4px solid #2C3E50;">
   <div style="width:2.4em;height:2.4em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.5em;color:#2C3E50;">
    <i data-lucide="monitor" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">HTML &amp; Styling</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-top:0.55em;">
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0.22em;padding:0.45em 0.55em 0.5em;border:1px dashed #E3B9AE;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(252,238,236,0.55);">
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.34em;color:#C77B66;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.1em;">several pages</div>
     <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#D45F47;text-align:center;">index.html</code>
     <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#D45F47;text-align:center;">about.html</code>
     <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#D45F47;text-align:center;">contact.html</code>
    </div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;color:#9B8EA0;font-weight:700;line-height:0.5;">+</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:0.22em;padding:0.45em 0.55em 0.5em;border:1px dashed #AEC9EC;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(220,233,250,0.55);">
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.34em;color:#3A7DC9;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.1em;">one stylesheet</div>
     <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.15em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#3A7DC9;text-align:center;">styles.css</code>
    </div>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
